basic_details.job_title: IIM Amritsar Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Professor, Associate Professor and More Post
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Amritsar (IIM Amritsar)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Amritsar (IIM Amritsar) Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026 on the official website of IIM Amritsar. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIM Amritsar Faculty Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. from a recognized institute/university, First Class (Min 60%) or equivalent grades in Master's and Bachelor's degrees
qualification.details: Ph.D. from a recognized institute/university. First Class (Min 60%) or equivalent grades in Master's and Bachelor's degrees. A consistently good academic record is required.

salary_details.details: Salary will be as per the 7th CPC (Central Pay Commission) recommendations. This corresponds to Academic Level 10 to 14.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Amritsar Faculty Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Amritsar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIM Amritsar Faculty Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIM Amritsar Faculty Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Amritsar Faculty Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Faculty Positions at IIM Amritsar is 30th June 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Faculty positions?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. from a recognized institution, along with First Class (minimum 60%) or equivalent grades in their Master's and Bachelor's degrees, and a strong academic record.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for these Faculty Positions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the Faculty Positions will be as per the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC) recommendations, falling under Academic Level 10 to 14.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Faculty positions at IIM Amritsar includes a Research Seminar followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q6. Can candidates from outside Punjab apply for these positions?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Punjab. However, it's advisable to check the official notification for any specific residency requirements.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for the IIM Amritsar Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the Faculty Positions at IIM Amritsar must be submitted online only.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Faculty Positions recruitment at IIM Amritsar is IIM ASR/DIR OFF/FRS/SRD/2175.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations mentioned for the Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age limits or age relaxations. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for detailed information.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link will be available on the official website of IIM Amritsar. Links are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
